meta.description: Daily FHIR R4 sync from athenahealth practices to HDIM for IPA quality management

parameters.jsCode:
// Practice configuration for 18 athenahealth practices
// In production, this would come from a database or config service
const practices = [
  { id: 'VPN-001', name: 'Valley Family Medicine', athenaId: 'practice-12345', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-002', name: 'Encino Internal Medicine', athenaId: 'practice-12346', providers: 3 },
  { id: 'VPN-003', name: 'Sherman Oaks Primary', athenaId: 'practice-12347', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-004', name: 'Tarzana Medical Group', athenaId: 'practice-12348', providers: 4 },
  { id: 'VPN-005', name: 'Woodland Hills Family', athenaId: 'practice-12349', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-006', name: 'Reseda Primary Care', athenaId: 'practice-12350', providers: 1 },
  { id: 'VPN-007', name: 'Van Nuys Medical', athenaId: 'practice-12351', providers: 3 },
  { id: 'VPN-008', name: 'Panorama City Health', athenaId: 'practice-12352', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-009', name: 'North Hills Primary', athenaId: 'practice-12353', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-010', name: 'Granada Hills Family', athenaId: 'practice-12354', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-011', name: 'Northridge Medical', athenaId: 'practice-12355', providers: 3 },
  { id: 'VPN-012', name: 'Chatsworth Primary', athenaId: 'practice-12356', providers: 1 },
  { id: 'VPN-013', name: 'Canoga Park Health', athenaId: 'practice-12357', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-014', name: 'West Hills Medical', athenaId: 'practice-12358', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-015', name: 'Calabasas Primary', athenaId: 'practice-12359', providers: 3 },
  { id: 'VPN-016', name: 'Agoura Hills Family', athenaId: 'practice-12360', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-017', name: 'Thousand Oaks Med', athenaId: 'practice-12361', providers: 2 },
  { id: 'VPN-018', name: 'Simi Valley Primary', athenaId: 'practice-12362', providers: 2 }
];

return practices.map(p => ({ json: p }));
